meta.name: Sanskrati Agrawal
meta.tagline: Building scalable, high-performance web applications with modern frontend technologies.

headline: Building
modern
web experiences
hero.intro: Frontend-focused software engineer specializing in React, TypeScript, scalable architectures, AI integrations, and high-performance user experiences. Passionate about crafting responsive and impactful digital products.

about.heading: About
about.lead: I'm a frontend engineer focused on building scalable, user-centric, and high-performance web applications.
paragraphs: Over the years, I’ve worked across enterprise platforms, AI-powered products, merchandising systems, and real-time applications. I enjoy solving complex frontend challenges, optimizing performance, and creating seamless user experiences with React and modern web technologies.

I work closely with cross-functional teams to architect scalable solutions, lead proof-of-concept initiatives, and deliver polished products. Beyond development, I enjoy mentoring teams, exploring AI tools and GenAI, and continuously learning emerging technologies.

experience.summary: Working as a ServiceNow Developer (Level III) to build scalable and centralized enterprise service platforms.
highlights: Designed and developed centralized platforms for accessing multiple enterprise services
Implemented features for incident management, user support, and service requests
Built scalable and user-friendly workflows improving operational efficiency

experience.summary: Developed scalable frontend solutions, merchandising platforms, and AI-powered customer experiences.
highlights: Led proof-of-concept (POC) initiatives and independently managed projects
Developed reusable npm libraries and optimized application performance
Built merchandising consoles, recommendation systems, and shopping assistant features
Enhanced platform scalability, reducing load times by 40%
Implemented customizable templates and segmentation systems improving engagement

experience.summary: Worked on customer-facing applications and communication systems as part of the core engineering team.
highlights: Maintained and enhanced enterprise applications with new features
Managed communication channels for customer applications
Collaborated across teams for scalable application development
Architected applications with senior engineers and architects

projects.title: Video Conferencing Application
projects.description: Built a real-time video conferencing application using Next.js, TailwindCSS, Clerk authentication, and Stream API with support for live video/audio communication, screen sharing, and real-time messaging.

projects.title: AI Demo Site
projects.description: Developed an AI demonstration platform showcasing company AI capabilities with interactive UI powered by AI APIs for enhanced customer engagement.

projects.title: Code Share
projects.description: Developed a real-time code-sharing platform with responsive frontend architecture using React.js and TailwindCSS.

projects.title: Phoenix Merchandiser Console
projects.description: Developed merchandising tools, A/B testing UI, preview systems, and product insight features that improved marketing efficiency and user engagement.

projects.title: Workbench
projects.description: Built customizable template-based UI systems, shopping assistant components, recommendation SDK integrations, and visual search enhancements.

projects.title: Customer Communication Platform
projects.description: Worked on enterprise customer communication applications and scalable frontend systems during tenure at TCS.

contact.heading: Let's build impactful digital experiences
contact.subheading: Open to exciting opportunities, collaborations, and innovative frontend projects.
